message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 8 goals for the model.

Iteration 1: I’m setting up the full participant structure (pools/lanes) first: the Insurance Company as the expanded main process, and Customer + External Assessor as collapsed external participants for message exchange.

Modeling the full insurer process now: trigger via customer message, case creation, coverage + threshold decisions, fast-track handling, assessor commissioning with 10-day deadline, and final decision notifications.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 9 issue(s) — details below.
Can you add the labels for the exclusive gateways "Covered?", "> €1500" and "Approve?".

Done — the exclusive gateways are labeled as "Covered?", "> €1500?", and "Approve?" in the model (see "GwCovered", "GwAbove1500", and "GwFinalApproved"). Let me know if you also want the outgoing sequence flows to be labeled (e.g., Yes/No, Above/Below).
